content: 1000 VS 1000 Player Minecraft Civil War Unstable SMP: ➜ @wemmbumc ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @Spokeishere ➜ @FlameFragsMC Thank you: @Spongs @Lomedy @yungymc @Twirps @fymada @saparata @TeamKalal1 & UU EVENTS This video takes place on the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP: a staged Minecraft server created by FlameFrags, Parrot, Wemmbu, and Spoke to tell cinematic stories in Minecraft.
